globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: /api/placeholder/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
globalHeaders.permissions-policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=(), bluetooth=()
